items.title: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
items.summary: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.

items.title: Viktor Orbán's Hungarian experiment runs out of steam
items.summary: Péter Magyar's historic win offers peace for a country exhausted by the tensions of Viktor Orbán's rule,  Nick Thorpe reports from Budapest.

items.title: Trump's threat raises risks and leaves predicaments unchanged
items.summary: The conflict is now a test of wills - Iran’s capacity to absorb strikes versus Trump’s tolerance for the war's costs.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 不只對峙還下毒？ 菲律賓指控中國漁船在南海投放氰化物

items.title: 普廷在歐洲最強內應垮台！奧班敗選下台 歐盟3兆援烏預算可望放行
items.summary: 匈牙利總理奧班（Viktor Orban）長年以來在歐盟內部扮演「踩煞車」的角色。隨著他在12日的國會大選中承認敗選，歐盟高層對此結果表示歡迎。外媒分析指出，這位經常阻擋歐盟重...…
